prompt: Ultra-realistic cinematic wide shot descending straight down through a vertical stack of seven distinct, evenly-spaced translucent horizontal glass layers — a clear visual of the OSI 7-layer network stack rendered as seven glowing strata stacked one below another and receding into depth, the camera falling past them one tier at a time. The topmost layer is a bright translucent panel holding a legible human-readable HTTP request ('GET /api/userprofile HTTP/1.1'). Each successive layer below strips more human meaning away: the readable text fragments into terse protocol header fields, then into packet-framing brackets, then into rows of raw hexadecimal, and finally, at the lowest tiers, dissolves into dense vertical streams of pure glowing binary code cascading like a data waterfall. Small faint numerals subtly mark the seven descending tiers from top to bottom. Matrix-like but photoreal and physical rather than illustrated, the meaning peeling away progressively down the stack. The digits are volumetric light, casting real reflections on faint metallic ribbon-like conduits running along the canyon walls. Deep near-black environment, electric cyan and cool blue as the dominant glow, a thin secondary layer of teal, controlled contrast with most of the frame in shadow. Atmospheric haze and drifting light particles give depth. Shallow-to-deep depth of field, foreground streams softly blurred, mid-plane sharp. Subtle chromatic aberration, fine sensor grain, real optical bokeh. 24mm lens, f/2.8, ISO 320. Dark-tech documentary-realism aesthetic in the style of an Apple or Nvidia launch film, cinematic and disciplined. Do not render as flat cartoon or clip-art code rain; keep it photoreal, volumetric, and restrained in color. Balanced, legible exposure — the luminous elements read bright, clearly exposed and detailed against deep but controlled blacks that retain detail, cohesive with the series' dark-tech grade. No muddy, murky, or underexposed haze; no crushed midtones.
negative_prompt: single flat plane, one layer only, no visible stack, flat green matrix screensaver, cartoon, illustration, clip art, vector, oversaturated neon, rainbow colors, cluttered chaos, distorted unreadable garbage, warped digits, watermark, logo, low resolution, plastic look, cheesy, lens flare spam, HDR halos, underexposed, muddy, murky, crushed midtones, dim underexposed glow, low-contrast haze, invisible details, washed out

settings.style: documentary realism, dark-tech cinematic, volumetric data canyon
settings.lighting: self-emissive binary streams, cyan/teal volumetric glow, deep shadow surround
settings.camera_angle: vertical descent through layered column, centered
settings.depth_of_field: layered, foreground streams soft, mid-plane sharp
settings.quality: high detail, volumetric haze, subtle grain
